name: CWF-510 Platform Metadata Generator Canonical
description: Generates platform-specific metadata for all publishing channels.

parameters.jsCode:
const metadata = {instance_id: 'META-' + Date.now(), artifact_family: 'platform_metadata_packet', schema_version: '1.0.0', producer_workflow: 'CWF-510', dossier_ref: $json.dossier_id, created_at: new Date().toISOString(), status: 'CREATED', payload: {metadata_complete: true, platforms_processed: ['youtube', 'blog', 'email'], youtube_metadata: {title: 'Generated Title', description: 'Full description', tags: ['tag1', 'tag2'], chapters: true}, blog_metadata: {slug: 'generated-slug', excerpt: 'brief_summary', seo_keywords: ['keyword1']}, email_metadata: {subject_line: 'Compelling Subject', preview_text: 'Preview text', cta_button: 'Learn More'}, seo_optimized: true}};
return [{ json: { ...$json, cwf510_result: { status: 'COMPLETED', platform_metadata_packet: metadata } } }];
